price.consumer_warning: Must be treated as stale unless fetched_at is current for the intended decision date.

pe.basis: provider valuation multiple; NOT guaranteed to be TTM, forecast, or annual-report PE
pe.consumer_warning: Do not label this as TTM PE or use it as a registration-grade valuation anchor without primary/financial reconciliation.

change_pct.basis: same-day percentage change in the fetched quote snapshot

value.basis: cross-sectional rank of lower PE and lower PB
value.consumer_warning: Depends on provider PE/PB basis; not registration-grade valuation.

quality.basis: cross-sectional ROE rank when raw roe exists; otherwise neutral median fill
quality.consumer_warning: If raw roe coverage is low, this factor collapses toward 50 and should not be interpreted as quality evidence.

momentum.consumer_warning: This is NOT 12-1 month momentum and must not be used as medium-term trend evidence.

size.basis: distance from 60th percentile log market-cap sweet spot

low_vol.basis: cross-sectional rank of lower same-day amplitude

_meta.research_use_warning: universe_* factors are screening hints only. Registration-grade thesis work must reconcile price, valuation, and financials against primary/committed evidence.
